title: Love Hurts
tmdbOverview: Family and friends try to sabotage the budding romance between a young upper class girl and a humble student.
synopsis: Love Hurts is a 2002 drama and romance film in Spanish. It carries a 6.7 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2000s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. An official age rating was not available at the time of writing.
